description: Offensive caster path for the Adept — intended fantasy is escalating spell damage. Stat tuning deferred: rows currently mirror the default rank curve (see defaultRankCurve in path_defs.go) so promotions still grant baseline HP/damage/AS bumps. Replace any rank row with path-specific numbers when the Arch Mage gets its formal pass. Bounds intentionally float her: the Adept's 108px footprint with `bottom` raised 18px to lift the sprite off the ground, and `ringOffsetY` pushed back down by the same amount so the selection ring stays planted where her feet would be — sells the hovering read together with the idle-as-walking bob (see pickAnimation in unitAnimation.ts).
